STG_4_PRSR_ULCR_DSCHRG_NOT_NUM STG_4_PRSR_ULCR_DSCHRG_NOT_NUM M0300D4 Stage 4 Pressure Ulcers Discharge Not Present or Lesser Stage on Admission Number CHAR 1 The number of stage 4 pressure ulcers at discharge that were not present or a lesser stage at admission.
263 STG_4_PRSR_ULCRS_ADMSN_NUM STG_4_PRSR_ULCRS_ADMSN_NUM 48CA/M0300D1 Stage 4 Pressure Ulcers Admission Number. When Discharge Date is on or after Oct. 1,2014, M0300D1 Stage 4 Pressure Ulcers Admission Number will be displayed CHAR 1
